<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Arch\Options; use Pest\Arch\Support\UserDefinedFunctions; /** * @internal */ final class TestCaseOptions { /** * The list of "targets" or "dependencies" to ignore. * * @var array<int, string> */ public array $ignore = []; /** * Ignores the given "targets" or "dependencies". * * @param array<int, string>|string $targetsOrDependencies * @return $this */ public function ignore(array|string $targetsOrDependencies): self { $targetsOrDependencies = is_array($targetsOrDependencies) ? $targetsOrDependencies : [$targetsOrDependencies]; $this->ignore = [...$this->ignore, ...$targetsOrDependencies]; return $this; } /** * Ignores global "user defined" functions. * * @return $this */ public function ignoreGlobalFunctions(): self { return $this->ignore(UserDefinedFunctions::get()); } }
